name: Kinchkha Waterfall
summary: Three-step waterfall cascade in the Satsiskvilo valley with optional zipline activity.
description: Kinchkha is one of the region's most striking waterfall sites, with multiple cascade levels and mountain scenery.
details: Kinchkha Waterfall is a natural monument in the Satsiskvilo valley.
The upper two waterfall stages are on the right tributary of the Satsiskvilo River, with approximate heights of 25 meters and 70 meters.
A connected streamflow forms the third stage, around 35 meters high.
The site is located in Khoni municipality near Kinchkha village at roughly 843 meters above sea level.
